problem: What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified
hypothesis: The key to What causes chronic fatigue syndrome — no biomarker or mechanism identified is Mitochondrial membrane potential modulation — specifically Mitochondrial membrane potential — which would help 17,000,000 people affected.
